realtime_memories.content: Execute immediately, don't ask obvious questions, verify things yourself. Do NOT prompt for permission on project_memory.json writes. When user pastes a prompt file, EXECUTE the workflow. BANNED WORDS (zero tolerance): honest, honestly, transparent, appreciate, absolutely, robust, leverage, delve. BANNED: em dashes. NEVER present incomplete work with remaining items; finish everything. Context compaction frustrates user; minimize context bloat.

Plugin/agent: keep global plugins under ~50, agent descriptions under 100 chars. CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=128000 in ~/.zshrc (launch-time only). Paper review: score = min(content, submission readiness); wrong template caps at 0.30. claude-never-forgets plugin DISABLED. User wants plugin trimming but keep Everything Claude Code, superpowers, and convenient defaults.

Patents: 3-patent stack in docs/ip/patent-{1,2,3}-*/ (4-5 HTML+MD+PDF each, 40 claims, all code-verified). P1 FILED (20260384), P2+P3 ready to file (~NOK 5,526). DIY prior art search (9 searches): ZERO blocking prior art for any patent. P2 (unilateral CSI) strongest. ARE genuinely novel extractor family. Papers: P1 dual-track, P2 WiSec 8pp complete. Session prompt for Paper 3 created at docs/guides/prompts/session-paper3-che-are.md. Academic contacts identified: Dodis (NYU), Vadhan (Harvard), Renner (ETH). Licensing targets: ID Quantique, IBM, Thales, Utimaco, DNB/SpareBank 1.

Auth: Supabase PKCE + FlutterWebAuth2 + native Apple Sign In. Redirect: com.qdaria.zipminator://login-callback. TestFlight: https://testflight.apple.com/join/cNX9nX7G. Full project: 9 pillars, 552 Rust + 429 Python tests, 6 platforms, PyPI v0.5.0.
